questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно использует время в time clause?

choices.text: I'll call you when I will arrive.
I'll call you when I arrive.
I'll call you when I am arriving.
I'll call you when I arrived.

questions.explanation: В time clause всегда используется Present Simple, а не Future Simple. Правильный вариант: 'I'll call you when I arrive.'

questions.prompt: Какой вариант грамматически верен для предложения с 'as soon as'?

choices.text: We'll leave as soon as the rain will stop.
We'll leave as soon as the rain stops.
We'll leave as soon as the rain stopped.
We'll leave as soon as the rain is stopping.

questions.explanation: В time clause после 'as soon as' используется Present Simple. Правильный вариант: 'We'll leave as soon as the rain stops.'

questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно описывает время в предложении с 'after'?

choices.text: They will go out after they will finish the work.
They will go out after they finish the work.
They will go out after they finished the work.
They will go out after they are finishing the work.

questions.explanation: После 'after' в time clause используется Present Simple. Правильный вариант: 'They will go out after they finish the work.'

questions.prompt: Какой вариант использует правильное время в time clause?

choices.text: She will start when the meeting will begin.
She will start when the meeting begins.
She will start when the meeting began.
She will start when the meeting is beginning.

questions.explanation: В time clause после 'when' используется Present Simple. Правильный вариант: 'She will start when the meeting begins.'

questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно использует время в предложении с 'when'?

choices.text: I'll go shopping when I will have time.
I'll go shopping when I have time.
I'll go shopping when I had time.
I'll go shopping when I am having time.

questions.explanation: В time clause используется Present Simple, а не Future. Правильный вариант: 'I'll go shopping when I have time.'

questions.prompt: Какой вариант грамматически верен для предложения с 'after'?

choices.text: He will call you after he will get the results.
He will call you after he gets the results.
He will call you after he got the results.
He will call you after he is getting the results.

questions.explanation: В time clause после 'after' используется Present Simple. Правильный вариант: 'He will call you after he gets the results.'

questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно использует время в time clause с 'as soon as'?

choices.text: She will leave as soon as the train will arrive.
She will leave as soon as the train arrives.
She will leave as soon as the train arrived.
She will leave as soon as the train is arriving.

questions.explanation: В time clause после 'as soon as' используется Present Simple. Правильный вариант: 'She will leave as soon as the train arrives.'

questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно описывает время в предложении с 'after'?

choices.text: I'll watch TV after I will finish my homework.
I'll watch TV after I finish my homework.
I'll watch TV after I finished my homework.
I'll watch TV after I am finishing my homework.

questions.explanation: В time clause после 'after' используется Present Simple. Правильный вариант: 'I'll watch TV after I finish my homework.'

questions.prompt: Какой вариант грамматически верен для предложения с 'when'?

choices.text: We will go to the park when the rain will stop.
We will go to the park when the rain stops.
We will go to the park when the rain stopped.
We will go to the park when the rain is stopping.

questions.explanation: В time clause используется Present Simple. Правильный вариант: 'We will go to the park when the rain stops.'

questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно использует время в придаточном предложении времени с 'when'?

choices.text: I will call you when I will arrive.
I will call you when I arrive.
I call you when I arrive.
I will call you when I arrived.

questions.explanation: В придаточных времени с 'when' всегда используется Present Simple, а главная часть может содержать 'will' или 'be going to'. Неправильные варианты используют Future Simple или Past Simple в придаточном.
